title: arabis albida var. brevifolia
intro: Arabis albida var. brevifolia, also known as White Rockcress or Alpine Rockcress, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family that is native to high-altitude regions in the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arabis albida var. brevifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Arabis albida var. brevifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for various medicinal uses.
